item.title: Blog
item.description: Blog Longer-form essays, reflections, and explanations. This is the slower, more narrative side of the site.

item.title: Cheatsheets
item.description: Cheatsheets Compact notes designed for quick recall.

item.title: ML Notes
item.description: ML Notes Notes on machine learning, deep learning, and AI systems. This section is where I try to turn confusion into clarity — one concept at a time.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Projects Build logs, experiments, and technical writeups. This is where ideas get tested against reality.

item.title: Ashwin's Digital Garden
item.description: Ashwin’s Digital Garden I use this space to think in public.
